overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxury modern waterfront villa during golden hour, transitioning from a covered walkway to an open terrace with palm trees, infinity pool, and ocean views. The cinematic game engine footage showcases high-end architectural visualization with ray-traced lighting, sleek contemporary design, and sci-fi elements including a floating aerial vehicle in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow covered walkway with dark walls and integrated LED lighting. The camera moves steadily forward toward the bright exit where palm trees and sky are visible, transitioning from artificial interior lighting to natural golden hour sunlight.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a spacious waterfront terrace bathed in golden hour sunlight. Tall palm trees frame the left side while the modern villa structure lines the right. The camera moves forward across wooden decking toward an infinity pool that blends into the ocean view, with mountains visible in the distant haze.

transparent glass wind barrier along the terrace edge

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around a distinctive sunken seating area with glass walls and a central fire pit, set into the wooden deck. The infinity pool shifts from right to left in the frame as the camera moves. A futuristic floating vehicle is visible in the distant sky. The modern villa's dark facade and overhanging roof structure dominate the background as the sun creates warm lens flares across the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed corridor into a sprawling, sun-drenched waterfront terrace. It begins within a narrow covered walkway defined by dark walls and integrated LED lighting, moving steadily toward a bright exit where the artificial glow gives way to natural golden hour sunlight. As the camera emerges, the scene opens into a spacious outdoor area where tall palm trees and the sleek villa structure frame a path across wooden decking toward an infinity pool that blends into a hazy mountain horizon. The movement then circles around a sunken seating area with glass walls and a central fire pit, shifting the pool's position in the frame while revealing a futuristic floating vehicle in the distant sky. Finally, the camera pans across the villa's dark facade and overhanging roof as warm lens flares sweep across the scene.
